description: Terraform EKS production cluster — review control-plane security and observability
review_checklist: Verify EKS control-plane logging is enabled

ground_truth.description: EKS version 1.21 reached EOL February 2023 — no security patches; upgrade to 1.29+
EKS endpoint_public_access=true with public_access_cidrs=0.0.0.0/0 — Kubernetes API server exposed to entire internet
endpoint_private_access=false — workloads must reach API server via public endpoint, traffic leaves VPC
encryption_config.resources is empty — Kubernetes secrets stored unencrypted in etcd
EKS cluster missing 'enabled_cluster_log_types' — no audit, authenticator, or controller-manager logs
Node group has SSH key but source_security_group_ids=[] — SSH access not restricted to bastion
